name: No God For Us
short_description: NGfU is a platform adventure set in an post-cataclysmic Earth now shattered to pieces . Humanity is struggling to survive. Cities are in ruins and abandoned, the air is toxic, no food remains and there is no place to call home.
detailed_description:
THE GAME

NGfU is a platform adventure set in an post-cataclysmic Earth now shattered to pieces . Humanity is struggling to survive. Cities are in ruins and abandoned, the air is toxic, no food remains and there is no place to call home.

You are Joshua Pirlock, a lone young man that arrives in a city thinking finally finding some food, water, or whatever he can that can be useful these hard days.

A new city, new dangers! As you arrive, you immediately understand that you can't go back, which is one more problem added to your heavy to-do list. You need to find a way to leave this world too.

THE GAMEPLAY


The Gameplay is a mix between a classical platformer game and a adventure . The exploration and the story are the main focus in this game . Your journey will bring you to different places , dangers , puzzles and non-comfortable dark places . You have to find a way to solve the puzzles that Joshua finds in his path .

  • A 2d Adventure-Platformer game with side scrolling mechanics
  • Different desolated scenarios where everything is in ruin
  • Very intense music that mixes blues and western
  • Find out the story and make your right choises


Every thing was made by one man
